user_story: US-03 — Como usuário, eu quero que o filtro e a página selecionados sejam preservados na URL
summary: Hook tests verify all URL sync behaviors for filter and pagination state preservation

tests.name: returns undefined status and page 1 when URL has no params
tests.evidence: Empty URL params load defaults: status=undefined, page=1

tests.name: ignores invalid status values and returns undefined
tests.evidence: Invalid status=invalid returns undefined, default applied

tests.name: ignores invalid page values and returns 1
setStatus updates URL with new status and resets page to 1
setStatus with undefined removes status param and resets page to 1
setPage updates page param and preserves status

RF-006.name: Filtro ativo refletido na URL como query param `status`
RF-006.test: setStatus updates URL with new status and resets page to 1

RF-007.name: Ao trocar filtro, página resetada para 1
tests: setStatus updates URL with new status and resets page to 1
setStatus with undefined removes status param and resets page to 1

RF-010.name: Página atual refletida na URL como query param `page`
RF-010.test: setPage updates page param and preserves status

RF-011.name: Ao navegar entre páginas, filtro de status preservado
RF-011.test: setPage updates page param and preserves status

RF-012.name: Ao carregar com query params válidos, filtro/página aplicados automaticamente
tests: returns undefined status and page 1 when URL has no params

RF-013.name: Parâmetros inválidos ignorados, valores padrão aplicados
tests: ignores invalid status values and returns undefined
ignores invalid page values and returns 1

conclusion: ALL REQUIREMENTS VERIFIED ✓ — Hook tests provide complete coverage of URL state synchronization behaviors. All RF-006 through RF-013 requirements satisfied.
